---
title: "PySDM"
description: "Notes on learning and experimenting with particle-based cloud microphysics"
aliases:
  - learn-pysdm.html
lang: en
page-layout: article
sidebar: pysdm-en
---

These notes connect the Super-Droplet Method with PySDM objects, official examples, and numerical cloud-seeding experiments. Each note has one physical question, a minimal piece of code, and a checkpoint leading to the next experiment.

The research environment and reproduction workflow are documented in [Build the Lab](build-the-lab.qmd), with hypothesis testing collected under [Experiments](experiments.qmd). The left navigation keeps all three tracks one click away.

::: {.manual-post-list}
::: {.manual-post}
<div class="manual-post-meta">2026-07-15 · Jinu</div>

### [Starting with PySDM: First Coordinates for Cloud Microphysics Experiments](posts/learn-pysdm/2026-07-15-first-steps/index.qmd)

Introducing the Super-Droplet Method and PySDM, then mapping the learning and experimentation path ahead.
:::
:::
